calendar.matters:
Spousal Property Petition
Off Calendar Jun-01-2026 Continued To Jun-22-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Thomas LaLanne, Esq. appearing representing Rosa Becerra, Petitioner/Surviving Spouse.

Petitioner to file verified pleading confirming there are no heirs.
Hearing on Spousal Support Petition is continued to Jun-22-2026 at 09:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Michael McNaughton; Clerk: Shanika Monroe; Not reported (D204)

Spousal Property Petition
Off Calendar Apr-13-2026 Continued To Jun-01-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The matter is continued to June 1, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Michael McNaughton. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Obi. Not reported.

Spousal Property Petition
Off Calendar Mar-16-2026 Continued To Apr-13-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Thomas LaLanne for petitioner Rosa Becerra (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on Petition for Spousal Property.

The Court inquired whether there were any intestate heirs. Mr. LaLanne reported that there were none and that petitioner is the surviving spouse.

The Court further inquired regarding the nature of the property interest at issue. Mr. LaLanne stated that the subject property had been held in joint tenancy and that petitioner had transferred her one-half interest into her trust prior to the decedent's death. Counsel explained that the petition seeks confirmation of the decedent's one-half interest to the surviving spouse so that the entire property may be held in the trust.

The Court noted that the petition was not clear as to the specific interest being requested and indicated that clarification was needed regarding the basis for the requested relief. The Court directed counsel to confer with the title company and to submit a revised proposed order clearly specifying the interest to be confirmed.

The matter was continued to April 13, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Michael B. McNaughton; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Oct-06-2025 Denied
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court denied the Spousal Property Petition.

Judge: Josh Fredricks. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Espin. Not reported.
